AzureAd.TenantId: <Your TenantId of the AzureAd Server App Registration>
AzureAd.ClientId: <Your ClientId of the AzureAd Server App Registration>
AzureAd.ClientSecret: <Your ClientSecret of the AzureAd Server App Registration>

Entra.//Enabled: Set to true to enable the /api/auth/exchange endpoint. Local-only deployments leave this false.
Entra.//Audience: Required when Enabled=true. Must match the token's 'aud' claim exactly. For v1.0 tokens typically 'api://<ClientId>'; for v2.0 tokens typically just '<ClientId>'. Decode a real token at jwt.ms to confirm before setting.
Entra.//AllowedTenantIds: Required when Enabled=true. Array of allowed tenant IDs.

Swagger.AuthorizationUrl: https://login.microsoftonline.com/<Your TenantId of the AzureAd Server App Registration>/oauth2/v2.0/authorize
Swagger.TokenUrl: https://login.microsoftonline.com/<Your TenantId of the AzureAd Server App Registration>/oauth2/v2.0/token
Swagger.ApiScope: api://<Your ClientId of the AzureAd Server App Registration>/access_as_user
Swagger.OpenIdClientId: <Your ClientId of the AzureAd Client App Registration>
